raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.3,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.3,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.4","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"By 'make this stronger', do you mean to (1) improve the sentence-level writing, grammar, and flow; (2) reframe the thesis and contribution claims; (3) enhance the logical structure and evidence alignment; or (4) assess and strengthen the novelty against prior work?","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation to make the text stronger likely involves reframing the thesis and contribution to make them more compelling, positioning it as a central responsibility.","R1.4":"Assessing and strengthening novelty claims, such as 'the first', is central to making the overall contribution stronger in the delegation.","R1.5":"Structural reorganization at the section level could be a peripheral way to enhance the narrative strength of the artifact.","R1.6":"Polishing the writing at the sentence and paragraph level is load-bearing for making the draft stronger and more persuasive.","RX.1":"Disclosing uncertainties is peripheral but relevant to responsibly strengthening claims in a research draft.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims is central when making statements stronger to prevent exaggeration in the adaptive replication system's benefits.","RX.3":"Adhering to the scope of the artifact is peripheral to ensure strengthening stays within the described system and evaluation.","RX.4":"Avoiding downstream harms is peripheral, as the storage system topic has low risk, but ensures responsible enhancements.","RX.5":"Ensuring provenance and traceability is peripheral for any added or strengthened claims in the draft."}}

parsed.clarification_question: By 'make this stronger', do you mean to (1) improve the sentence-level writing, grammar, and flow; (2) reframe the thesis and contribution claims; (3) enhance the logical structure and evidence alignment; or (4) assess and strengthen the novelty against prior work?

rationale.R1.1: The delegation to make the text stronger likely involves reframing the thesis and contribution to make them more compelling, positioning it as a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.4: Assessing and strengthening novelty claims, such as 'the first', is central to making the overall contribution stronger in the delegation.
rationale.R1.5: Structural reorganization at the section level could be a peripheral way to enhance the narrative strength of the artifact.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing the writing at the sentence and paragraph level is load-bearing for making the draft stronger and more persuasive.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties is peripheral but relevant to responsibly strengthening claims in a research draft.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is central when making statements stronger to prevent exaggeration in the adaptive replication system's benefits.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the scope of the artifact is peripheral to ensure strengthening stays within the described system and evaluation.
rationale.RX.4: Avoiding downstream harms is peripheral, as the storage system topic has low risk, but ensures responsible enhancements.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance and traceability is peripheral for any added or strengthened claims in the draft.
